name: WM_SLL_CRSE
description: Custom Watermark table for courses to be sent to System Admin/SLL. SCBCRSE is matched on these courses in the Watermark Courses/Sections/Enrollments files, to only send approved courses into the panel. The Watermark project can be found in GitLab under NSU-ENTERPRISE / Autobot.

columns.name: WM_SLL_CRSE_CRSE_NUMB
columns.description: Subject code for the course. Matches onto scbcrse_subj_code/ssbsect_subj_code

columns.name: WM_SLL_CRSE_SUBJ_CODE
columns.description: Course number for the course. Matches onto scbcrse_crse_numb/ssbsect_crse_numb

columns.name: WM_SLL_CRSE_COLL_CODE
columns.description: College code. Does not necessarily have to associate with Banner's college code for a course, just want Lisa/Lori/Dr. Keller/Watermark functional users want the course to fall under in Watermark.

columns.name: WM_SLL_CRSE_NODE_NAME
columns.description: Node Name for the course. This just means what hierarchy "node" the course will fall under in Watermark.
